texto: If we are to welcome the elderly into our communities and support them to stay there for as long as possible, if we are to attend to the social needs of our elderly citizens both inside and out of institutions, then we need both government intervention and funding, along with the community's engagement and help.
explicacao: Citação de Karen Hitchcock sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If we are to welcome the elderly into our communities and support them to stay there for as long …” articula reflexao, ageing, ageism em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e termino.
